description:
You are acting as a developer who is tidying-up project-history information.  
A log file named  

  /home/user/workspace/reports/change_history.log  

already exists.  It lists every file operation (ADD, MODIFY, DELETE, …) that occurred during the last build.

Your goal: extract only the “image-file modification” lines (i.e. lines where

  • the second column is exactly the word “MODIFY”, **and**  
  • the file-path in the third column ends with .png, .jpg **or** .svg, case-sensitively),

and save those lines—preserving their original order—into a new file called  

  /home/user/workspace/reports/image_modifications.log  

Requirements and precise format that will be automatically verified:

1. image_modifications.log must be created in the same /home/user/workspace/reports directory.  
2. It must contain **only** the matching lines, no header or footer.  
3. Lines must appear in the exact order they appear in change_history.log.  
4. Each line must be terminated by a single Unix line-feed (LF, “\n”).  
5. No leading or trailing blank lines and no trailing spaces on any line.  

The contents of image_modifications.log must therefore be **exactly** (including spaces and punctuation):

[2023-11-01 09:12:46] MODIFY assets/logo.png  
[2023-11-01 09:12:48] MODIFY assets/banner.jpg  
[2023-11-01 09:12:50] MODIFY assets/icons/menu.svg  

(three lines, each ending in “\n”).  

Accomplish the task with a single terminal command that uses a regular expression filter and redirection (e.g., grep or similar).  Do not manually edit the file—use the command line.
truth:
Initial state (pre-existing):

Directory: /home/user/workspace/reports  (already present and writable)

File: /home/user/workspace/reports/change_history.log  
Contents (each line ends with LF):

[2023-11-01 09:12:45] ADD src/components/Header.js
[2023-11-01 09:12:46] MODIFY assets/logo.png
[2023-11-01 09:12:47] DELETE src/utils/helpers.py
[2023-11-01 09:12:48] MODIFY assets/banner.jpg
[2023-11-01 09:12:49] ADD README.md
[2023-11-01 09:12:50] MODIFY assets/icons/menu.svg
[2023-11-01 09:12:51] DELETE docs/old_manual.pdf

Expected artefact created by the agent:

File: /home/user/workspace/reports/image_modifications.log  
Permissions: 0644 or more permissive (user-writable)  
Exact contents (each line ends with LF, no extra whitespace):

[2023-11-01 09:12:46] MODIFY assets/logo.png
[2023-11-01 09:12:48] MODIFY assets/banner.jpg
[2023-11-01 09:12:50] MODIFY assets/icons/menu.svg

The automated test will:

1. Verify that /home/user/workspace/reports/image_modifications.log exists.  
2. Read the file and compare its byte-for-byte contents against the expected three-line string above.  
3. Ensure no additional lines or trailing whitespace are present.  
4. Optionally check that the agent used only one command (not enforced, but noted).
